title: New Latvian coalition intends to double up on cabinet meetings
summary_full: The new cabinet of Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs will meet not once but twice per week, reports Latvian Television.
summary_public: The new cabinet of Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs will meet not once but twice per week, reports Latvian Television.

LV.label: neutral
LV.evidence: New Latvian coalition intends to double up on cabinet meetings
